title: Contextual labeling / educated guesses / external data

china-office.note_html: The label-refinement step within the china-office VQA run.

vqa.question: Take a closer look at any object whose label seems uncertain and tell me what it really is.
vqa.answer: There are no ambiguous objects that need relabeling at the moment.

dimsim-spatial-memory.note_html: The label-refinement step within the DimSim VQA run.

vqa.question: Take a closer look at any object whose label seems uncertain and tell me what it really is.
vqa.answer: There are currently no objects with uncertain labels to refine. Everything seen is confidently identified.

human-activity.reason: Refines static object labels; not exercised by the activity scenario.

summary_html: When the detector is unsure or produces a useless label ("object", class_17, low confidence), ask a vision-language model for an educated guess — feeding it evidence the detector never uses: the cropped detection image, the detector's own guess + confidence, the object's measured real-world size, and what else is nearby. A "mouse" next to a keyboard and monitor is a computer mouse, not an animal. Exposed as agent skills on ObjectSceneRegistrationModule.

skills.name: identify_object(object_id)
skills.desc_html: Refine one observed object's label with the VLM (crop + size + neighbors as context); the refined name persists in the ObjectDB

skills.name: refine_observed_labels()
skills.desc_html: Batch sweep over every ambiguous permanent object (low confidence / generic name); item 2's catalog_scene() calls this automatically

skills_note: pure helpers (prompt building, ambiguity gate, VLM call) live in dimos/perception/contextual_labeling.py

how_it_works.title: Gate on ambiguity
how_it_works.html: is_ambiguous() selects only detections worth a VLM call: confidence below 0.5, an empty/generic name (object, thing, unknown…), or a raw class_N id. Confident specific labels are left alone.

how_it_works.title: Build the context prompt
how_it_works.html: build_context_prompt() assembles what the robot knows but the detector ignored: detector guess + confidence, measured world size (from item 2's localization), and up to 8 nearest neighbors from the ObjectDB scene as "keyboard (0.4m away)" lines, nearest first.

how_it_works.title: Ask the VLM
how_it_works.html: contextual_label() crops the stored detection image (20 px padding), queries the configured VlModel (global_config.detection_model) for strict JSON, and returns a ContextualLabel (label, one-line description, clamped confidence). Query failures or malformed JSON return None — the raw detector label is kept.

how_it_works.title: Persist the refinement
how_it_works.html: Object gained refined_name / refined_description; the raw detector name is preserved alongside. Encoders and find_by_name prefer/accept the refined label, and refinement survives update_object() merges. Skills: identify_object(object_id) (one item) and refine_observed_labels() (batch over ambiguous permanent objects), plus a refine_object_labels() RPC.

test_descriptions.test_confident_specific_name_is_not_ambi: A confident "cup" is left alone — no VLM call
test_descriptions.test_prompt_includes_detector_guess_size: Prompt carries guess + confidence, real-world size, neighbor lines
test_descriptions.test_describe_neighbors_sorted_and_exclu: Neighbor context is nearest-first and never includes the object itself
test_descriptions.test_describe_neighbors_caps_count: Neighbor list capped at 8 to bound prompt size
test_descriptions.test_contextual_label_happy_path: Stub VLM JSON becomes a ContextualLabel with label/description/confidence
test_descriptions.test_contextual_label_clamps_and_default: Out-of-range/missing VLM confidence is clamped to [0, 1] / defaulted
test_descriptions.test_contextual_label_rejects_bad_respon: Query failures and malformed JSON return None (raw label kept)
test_descriptions.test_contextual_label_requires_image: Objects without a stored crop are skipped, not crashed on
test_descriptions.test_display_name_prefers_refined: display_name shows the refined label once one exists
test_descriptions.test_locate_encode_surfaces_refined_name: Agent encoding exposes refined name and preserves the detector's raw name
test_descriptions.test_update_object_preserves_refinement: Refinement survives ObjectDB merges of new sightings
test_descriptions.test_identify_object_skill_refines_and_p: identify_object(object_id) refines one item and persists it in the DB
test_descriptions.test_refine_observed_labels_only_targets: Batch skill only spends VLM calls on ambiguous objects
test_descriptions.test_refine_observed_labels_nothing_to_d: No ambiguous objects → explicit "nothing to refine" answer
test_descriptions.test_prompt_carries_neighbor_and_size_co: Skill-verification: the VLM prompt for an ambiguous "mouse" carries its detector guess, measured real-world size, and keyboard/monitor neighbors
test_descriptions.test_refine_only_relabels_ambiguous_and_: Skill-verification: refine_observed_labels() refines the ambiguous item (stub VLM) and leaves confident ones; writes a before/after label table for review

tests_note_html: VLM stubbed in unit tests; live model comes from global_config.detection_model. The last two rows are from the skill-verification suite (dimos/skills/skill_verification), which drives the real refinement path and writes a before/after label table to test_outputs/ (indexed by REVIEW.md)

examples.pre_html: # the detector saw a blurry blob on the desk >>> module.identify_object("a1b2c3d4") Refined 'object' (conf 0.31) → 'espresso machine' (conf 0.78): "Compact chrome espresso machine with a portafilter." # or sweep everything ambiguous in one call >>> module.refine_observed_labels()
examples.caption: identify_object / refine_observed_labels skills — VLM answer persisted as refined_name

next_step_html: External data sources (e.g. OSM lookups via dimos/agents/skills/osm.py, object databases) as additional context, and live validation on the Go2 (the VLM path is already exercised for real against item 2's replayed session).

review_artifacts.label: labels_before_after.txt
review_artifacts.note: each object's detector label vs refined label + the VLM prompt; ambiguous mouse relabeled via its keyboard/monitor neighbors, confident items unchanged

manual_tests.name: test_replay_catalog_with_vlm_descriptions
manual_tests.desc_html: Real moondream VLM refines all 18 objects catalogued by item 2's Go2 session replay; every description lands in the list_observed_items() catalog
